MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Paulette Ellis.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vicky Guerron and Johnathan Luciano are present.
Attorney James C. Lin representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May-21-2012 is vacated. (D501)
